title: Specialist – Cloud Operations & Managed Services, Operations & Maintenance (Security)
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Monitor, operate, and maintain cybersecurity systems including firewalls, antivirus software, intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS), and other security tools.

  • Assist in identifying, investigating, and responding to security incidents, providing first-level troubleshooting and proper documentation.

  • Coordinate with technology vendors for issue escalation and resolution.

  • Conduct regular vulnerability assessments and manage patching activities to ensure systems remain secure.

  • Support security audits by preparing logs, reports, and documentation; ensure compliance with security best practices and regulatory requirements.

  • Collaborate with IT teams, network engineers, and other stakeholders to implement security controls and support operational needs.

  • Maintain detailed documentation on security procedures, incidents, and overall cybersecurity environment.

  • Lead a team of engineers to execute Day 1 (implementation) and Day 2 (operations) functions effectively.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent.

  • Professional certifications in cybersecurity solutions preferred.

  • Minimum 5 years of experience in cybersecurity maintenance or IT security operations.

  • Proven experience in leading and managing technical teams.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.

  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

  • Team-oriented with a strong customer service mindset.

  • Experience in one or more cybersecurity domains such as Endpoint Protection, Network Security, or Identity and Access Management (IAM).

  • CISSP or equivalent certification is an advantage.

  • Operational experience in Container Security and Key Management is a plus.

    Work Location: Tampines

    (EA Reg No: 20C0312)

    Please email a copy of your detailed resume to kayla@talentsis.com.sg for immediate processing.

    Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Talentsis Pte Ltd is a new-age talent acquisition and staffing service company. The company aims to be a one-stop service to provide a full spectrum of HR related services, including but not limited to the following:

  1. Recruitment and Talent Acquisition
  2. Executive Search
  3. Headhunting
  4. Contract & Flexible Staffing
  5. Manpower Outsourcing
  6. Reskilling & Upskilling
  7. HR Consultancy & Advisory Service


(EA Reg No: 20C0312)
